notes: MegaList — new top-level section for building named checklists of Valheim items. Filter in Valheim Data then use Export → Add to list… to stamp the current results into a new or existing list. Each list has sort (A–Z / Z–A / biome), biome filter chips, per-item checkboxes that persist, check-all on visible rows, copy-unchecked-to-clipboard, add/remove items, rename/duplicate/delete lists. Everything syncs across devices via cloud sync so you can seed a list on desktop and tick items off on your phone while labelling chests.
